backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining Task and TeamMember data types with CRUD operations: createTask, updateTaskStatus, deleteTask, getAllTasks, getTasksByAssignee, addTeamMember, removeTeamMember. Uses a migration hook to handle schema upgrades.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state from OldActor (3-status tasks) to NewActor (4-status tasks including CarryForward) by mapping each task's status through a conversion function.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated source files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for the Team Task Manager app.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summaries of all frontend source files describing each component, hook, and utility's purpose and key changes (e.g., CarryForward support, custom date range export, notification bell updates).
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Team Task Manager' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with two routes (AdminDashboard at '/' and TeamMemberView at '/my-tasks'), wraps the app in a dark ThemeProvider, and renders a Sonner Toaster.
Dialog form component for creating new tasks with fields for title, optional conference name, description, assignee, deadline, and priority; validates required fields and calls the createTask mutation with nanosecond deadline conversion.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a sticky header (logo, nav links, notification bell), a centered main content area, and a footer with attribution.
Dialog modal for managing team members, allowing users to add new members by name and remove existing ones, with loading skeletons and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Bell icon button that shows a dropdown panel of task reminders categorized as overdue, critical, warning, or carry-forward, with a badge count indicator.
frontend/src/components/PriorityBadge.ts: Small badge component that renders a colored pill with emoji and label for High, Medium, or Low task priority levels.
frontend/src/components/ReportExportButt: Provides buttons to export tasks as CSV for the current week, current month, or a custom date range selected via a popover with date inputs.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Displays a single task's details (title, priority, urgency, assignee, deadline, conference) with expandable description, status control, and a delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/TaskFilters.tsx: Filter bar component with a text search input and an assignee dropdown selector, plus a clear button that appears when any filter is active.
frontend/src/components/TaskStatusContro: A dropdown control component that displays and updates a task's status (Pending, InProgress, Completed, CarryForward) with a loading spinner and toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/TeamMemberCard.t: A collapsible card component for a team member that shows their avatar, task status summary badges, and an expandable list of sorted task cards fetched by assignee.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching tasks, team members, and mutations for creating, updating, deleting tasks and managing team members.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskFilters.ts: A memoized hook that filters a list of tasks by search text and selected assignee based on provided filter state.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskReminders.ts: A hook that categorizes all tasks into overdue, due within one hour, due within 24 hours, and carry-forward buckets for reminder display purposes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including urgency and carry-forward colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying all tasks with stats (pending, in-progress, completed, carry-forward, overdue), task filters, and modals for creating tasks and managing the team. Includes tabs for tasks and team members views.
frontend/src/pages/TeamMemberView.tsx: Team member view page that lets a user select their name from a dropdown and see their assigned tasks with status summary badges (pending, in-progress, completed).
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility functions for generating and downloading CSV reports of tasks, with helpers to filter tasks by current week, current month, or a custom date range.
frontend/src/utils/reminderLogic.ts: Utility functions to check if a task is overdue, due within one hour, or due within twenty-four hours based on its deadline nanosecond timestamp.
frontend/src/utils/taskSorting.ts: Exports a single function that sorts an array of tasks by nearest deadline first, then by priority (High > Medium > Low) as a tiebreaker.
frontend/src/utils/taskUrgency.ts: Provides urgency level classification (overdue, critical, warning, normal, completed) for tasks and returns corresponding Tailwind CSS class strings for card borders, badges, and labels.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), oklch-based semantic color tokens (border, primary, urgency, carry-forward, sidebar, chart), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, feature list, architectural notes, and known issues for a React + Motoko ICP task management app with admin and team-member roles.
